pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and access newer framework features.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target/release level remains at 17, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts between Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters, leading to compilation errors or null pointer exceptions at runtime when accessing mapped fields.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace explicit source and target configuration with the release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern Java toolchains; using 'release' ensures consistent compilation against the target JDK's API and language features.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HttpSecurity configuration from the legacy fluent API to the lambda-based DSL introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The legacy methods like .cors().and() and .csrf().disable() are deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.3, causing compilation errors or runtime failures if not updated.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Migrate authorizeHttpRequests configuration from the legacy fluent API to the lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The legacy .authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers()...and() pattern is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Add static import for Customizer.withDefaults() to support the new lambda-based configuration style.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is required by the new .cors(withDefaults()) syntax; without the import, the code will not compile.
